pi_items.source: Found via explicit requirement in task description and export_result.sh parsing logic.
Found via exact text search in export_result.sh grep commands and verifier.py checks.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Flight Crew View Android application (package com.robert.fcView, version 3.9.4). The expected output file '/sdcard/app_info_report.txt' and its required format headers ('App Version:', 'Developer Email:') exactly match the task constraints and export_result.sh parsing logic. However, there is a critical bug in the task's ground truth generation: the setup_task.sh script statically injects 'robert@flightcrewview.com' as the expected developer email. Static analysis of the app's libapp.so binary strings and public Google Play listings confirm the actual developer email displayed and used by the app is 'support@flightcrewview.com'. Consequently, the strict equality verifier check will incorrectly penalize an agent for extracting the true displayed email.
